reviews.comment:
A pesar de notarse que es una estación vieja, no deteriorada, porque está bien cuidada, es una de las pocas estaciones que posee todo lo necesario en el baño, tiene jabón antibacterial, papel para secarse y los playeros son respetuosos y atentos...

(Translated by Google)
Although it's clearly an older station, it's not run down because it's well-maintained. It's one of the few stations that has everything you need in the bathroom: antibacterial soap, paper towels, and the beachgoers are respectful and attentive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10933277104463478772/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNTMElXZUlnEAE
